_description: E-signature patterns, credential validation, and signature freshness rules for document validation. Used in M1E provider validation and document validation (Path A: e-signed, Path B: wet ink, Path C: chart notes).
_used_by: M1E (Provider & Chart Notes), Document Validation Path A/B/C
_source: Visual Tree v0.19.0 M1E, Codified Logic Tree v0.16.5 Stage 1, Master Assumptions v0.16

electronic_signature_patterns._description: Patterns that indicate an electronic/digital signature is present.

wet_ink_indicators._description: Indicators of a physical (wet ink) signature. LLM/OCR must detect these from image analysis.
wet_ink_indicators.notes: Wet ink detection is primarily an OCR/vision task. The LLM should flag whether a physical signature appears to be present in the signature block area of the document.

can_order_independently.description: Physicians who can independently order sleep studies for all payers.

mid_level_may_need_supervising.description: Mid-level providers. Some payers require supervising physician info for authorization.
mid_level_may_need_supervising.human_action: Verify if supervising physician info is required for auth.

requires_attending.description: Trainees cannot independently order. Attending/supervising physician REQUIRED.
requires_attending.human_action: Attending physician signature required for authorization.

cannot_order.description: Support staff who cannot sign medical orders.
cannot_order.human_action: Request signed order from physician. MA/RN signature alone is not valid.
cannot_order.exception: If MA/RN signed but supervising physician is named on the document AND physician credentials are verified, treat as valid with FLAG_SUPERVISING_NEEDED.

unknown.human_action: Verify credentials during processing. Look up via NPI if available.

signature_freshness._description: Rules for signature/order date validity. Checked in M1E.

future_date.description: Signature date is in the future -- likely data entry error.
future_date.human_action: Contact provider to verify. Cannot process until resolved.

stale.description: Order is more than 1 year old.
stale.human_action: Check payer-specific requirements. May need updated/re-signed order.

aging.condition: signature_date < today - 180 days AND signature_date >= today - 365 days
aging.description: Order is 6-12 months old. Still valid but aging.
aging.human_action: Note for awareness. Some payers have stricter freshness requirements.

current.description: Order is within 6 months. No freshness concerns.

payer_overrides._description: Some payers have stricter freshness requirements than the default 1-year rule.
payer_overrides._note: Check payer_criteria_map.json for payer-specific rules. Default rules above apply when no override exists.

format.description: NPI is exactly 10 digits, all numeric.

lookup_cascade._description: When NPI is missing or invalid, follow this lookup order.

steps.description: CMS NPPES Registry API lookup by name
Flag for manual entry if all lookups fail

npi_found_name_differs.description: NPI found in registry but name doesn't match document.
npi_found_name_differs.human_action: Verify correct provider. May be name variant or wrong NPI.

npi_not_in_registry.description: NPI not found in NPPES registry.
npi_not_in_registry.human_action: Verify NPI. Add to provider databank if confirmed.
